# Scrubbys SG

> Singapore-owned professional cleaning company specialising in residential deep cleaning, founded 2022. Serves HDB flats, condominiums, and landed properties across Singapore.

## Services
- Post Renovation Cleaning — from $350 (300-599 sft), scales by size
- End of Tenancy Cleaning — from $380 (300-599 sft), scales by size
- Spring Cleaning — from $380 (300-599 sft), scales by size
- Upholstery Cleaning — sofa, mattress, curtains, carpet/rug, chairs
- Floor Deep Scrub (Rotowash Floor Scrub) — vinyl, cement, tiles, parquet, engineered timber, marble — from $250
- Formaldehyde Treatment — from $288, includes pre and post air quality readings
- Specialised cleaning: oven/hood degreasing, window cleaning, grout treatment, chandelier cleaning, high level cleaning
- Other services: painting, handyman, marble and parquet polishing, aircon servicing

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +65 90716978
- Email: scrubbyspteltd@gmail.com
- Address: Ubi Road 1, Oxley BizHub, Singapore
- UEN: 202313458R
